description_long: This object is a modern tactical shotgun with a matte black finish, featuring a synthetic adjustable stock and a prominent pistol grip for enhanced control. The barrel is long and ribbed, with a vented heat shield running along the top, and a front sight post is visible. The receiver is robust, with a visible ejection port and a pump-action fore-end that has a ribbed texture for improved grip. A red shotgun shell is positioned near the shotgun, highlighting its ammunition type. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for gloved fingers. The overall design is utilitarian and rugged, suitable for urban law enforcement or tactical scenarios.
description: A modern black tactical shotgun with a ribbed barrel, adjustable stock, pistol grip, and a red shotgun shell nearby. The design is robust and utilitarian, with a vented heat shield and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: The shotgun is viewed from the muzzle end, showing the ribbed fore-end, front sight, and the length of the barrel, with the red shell to the right.
description_view_1: A full side profile reveals the adjustable stock, pistol grip, ribbed pump, and the entire length of the barrel, with the red shell below the receiver.
description_view_2: Viewed from above, the ribbed heat shield and the alignment of the barrel are visible, with the red shell to the left.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile displays the same features as view 1, with the red shell now above the receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with ribbed vented heat shield and long barrel
attribute_stock_type: adjustable full stock with pistol grip
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
